drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f1 >= "b", f1 != "", $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f2)
then
    insert(new T1(-1000000007, $p0_0.getF1(), $b0_0_1));
    insert(new T1(-5, $p0_0.getF1(), $b0_0_1));
end
rule "R1"
salience -10
when
    (or not T3(f0 != -2.0) not T3(f0 != -2.0))
then
    insertLogical(new T3(0.0));
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f2 != true || f2 != false, $b2_0_0 : f1)
    exists T1()
then
    insert(new T2($p2_0.getF0(), $p2_0.isF2(), true));
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1()
    T0(f2 == true, f1 matches "(|z)*pha*", $b3_1_0 : f2)
    $p3_2 : T2(f2 != false, $b3_2_0 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T3($p3_2.getF0()));
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1(f0 <= -4, f1 contains "et", $b4_0_0 : f1)
then
end
